name: Alight, Inc. / Delaware
summary: PART I . Throughout this section, references to we, us, and our refer to Alight and its consolidated subsidiaries as the context so requires. Alight is a technology-enabled services company delivering human capital management solutions to many of the worlds largest and most complex organizations. This includes the implementation and administration of employee benefits (e.g., health, wealth and leaves) solutions.
